Pattern syntax caught in Parse: partial-segment wildcards, bad names,
misplaced terminal wildcards, invalid group prefixes.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26
-- main.go --
package main

import "os"

func main() { os.Exit(run()) }
-- web/web.go --
package web

import "net/http"

//fabrik:http GET /a{x}
func A(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}

//fabrik:http GET /{1bad}
func B(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}

//fabrik:http GET /{$}/tail
func C(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}

//fabrik:http GET /{p...}/tail
func D(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}

//fabrik:http GET /x/{}
func E(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}

//fabrik:http:group /api/{$}
type F struct{}

//fabrik:http:group /files/{p...}
type G struct{}
-- want/diags --
error: web/web.go:5:19: invalid route pattern: a wildcard must be a full segment (in "a{x}")
  help: wildcards: /{name}, /{name...} (rest of path, last), /{$} (exact match, last)
error: web/web.go:8:19: invalid route pattern: invalid wildcard name in "{1bad}"
  help: wildcards: /{name}, /{name...} (rest of path, last), /{$} (exact match, last)
error: web/web.go:11:19: invalid route pattern: "{$}" must be the last segment
  help: wildcards: /{name}, /{name...} (rest of path, last), /{$} (exact match, last)
error: web/web.go:14:19: invalid route pattern: "{p...}" must be the last segment
  help: wildcards: /{name}, /{name...} (rest of path, last), /{$} (exact match, last)
error: web/web.go:17:19: invalid route pattern: invalid wildcard name in "{}"
  help: wildcards: /{name}, /{name...} (rest of path, last), /{$} (exact match, last)
error: web/web.go:20:21: group prefix cannot contain "{$}" or "{name...}" (got "/api/{$}")
  help: terminal wildcards cannot have routes appended after them
error: web/web.go:23:21: group prefix cannot contain "{$}" or "{name...}" (got "/files/{p...}")
  help: terminal wildcards cannot have routes appended after them
